description: Testing image upload functionality across different sources, file types, dimensions, names and validation cases

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Drag drop image / Click Upload button to upload image from
+ PC
+ Shared device: Mobile ...
+ USB, Facebook, Instagram..
expected_result:
+ Can upload image successfully
+ Update into DB correctly
+ Image displays in published WEB/APP correctly as setting
+ Image displays in published WEB/APP correctly when EDIT uploaded image

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Upload image with below extension
+ .jpg, .jpeg, png, tiff, gif, ico, asf, svg
expected_result:
+ Can upload image successfully
+ Update into DB correctly
+ Image displays in published WEB/APP correctly as setting
+ Image displays in published WEB/APP correctly when EDIT uploaded image

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Upload image with below types
+ all images are horizontal images 
+ all images are vertical images
+ both horizontal images and vertical images
expected_result:
+ Can upload image successfully
+ Update into DB correctly
+ Image displays in published WEB/APP correctly as setting
+ Image displays in published WEB/APP correctly when EDIT uploaded image

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Upload image with all kinds of name
+ Max value -1
+ Max value
+ Has special symbol: ".", "-", "_", "#"
+ Has English character (Upper and Lower char)
+ Includes SQL injection 
+ Includes HTML (Scripts)
+ Includes half-width characters
+ Includes full-width characters
expected_result:
+ Can upload image successfully
+ Update into DB correctly
+ Image displays in published WEB/APP correctly as setting
+ Image displays in published WEB/APP correctly when EDIT uploaded image

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Upload image with incorrect data
+ Incorrect size: + 0 KB, > Max size, < Min size
+ Incorrect height: > Max height, < Min height
+ Incorrect width: > Max width, < Min width
+ Incorrect extension: mp4, mov, txt, xls...
+ XLS file that has been changed extention from jpg file
+ JPG file that has been changed extention from xls file
+ Upload more than max quantity
expected_result:
+ Show error message properly
+ Cannot upload image
+ Not update into DB

item_type: Check display of image when change setting
description: Testing image display behavior when adjusting size, rotation, and zoom settings

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display of image when do below action

+ Set Image with min size (input number or click + -)
+ Set Image with normal size (input number or click + -)
+ Set Image with max size (input number or click + -)
+ Change rotation: Left - Right continuously
+ Zoom in - zoom out until cannot zoom
+ Fit size
+ Click Fit size after change size / change rotation / zoom in zoom out
expected_result:
Can edit successfully
Image is not broken
Image displays in published WEB/APP correctly as setting

description: Testing image link functionality under different user authentication states and permissions

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Click/ Double click on New link / Edited link in image

Condition: 
+ Link is permitted to access with customer user
+ User status: log-out
expected_result: Can open link successfully with the same tab / not the same tab [base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Click/ Double click on New link / Edited link in image

Condition: 
+ Link is permitted to access with customer user
+ User status: log-in
expected_result: Can open link successfully with the same tab / not the same tab [base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Click/ Double click on New link / Edited link in image

Condition: 
+ Link is not permitted to access with customer user
+ User status: log-out
expected_result:
Can not open link
Open proper page (Ex: login page. After login, will open that link)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Click/ Double click on New link / Edited link in image

Condition: 
+ Link is not permitted to access with customer user
+ User status: log-in
expected_result: Can open link successfully with the same tab / not the same tab [base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of image after deleting link
expected_result:
When hover on image, it shows mouse icon not  palm
When click image, no link is opened
